name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week, inconsistent vendor performance causes late orders. We automate weekly scorecard generation instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
features: manual data entry for delivery metrics
